steps.instruction:
*Check the Device*
• Verify if the keyboard/mouse is completely unresponsive or physically damaged.
_Expected: Issue is confirmed as hardware failure._

*Try a Different Port*
• Unplug and reconnect to a different USB port.
_Expected: Device still fails to work._

*Check Wireless Receiver (if applicable)*
• Ensure the USB wireless dongle is plugged in securely and batteries are charged.
_Expected: Connection is ruled out._

*Raise Hardware Replacement Ticket*
• Please provide your Employee ID when prompted to raise a ticket for a replacement.
_Expected: Ticket is created and IT team will dispatch replacement to your location._
